conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemistry, Karl-Franzens-University, Central Polymer Laboratory/Molecular Characteristics (CePol/MC), 8010 Graz, Austria
conditions.evidence_text: Critical conditions for EO were found on the Synergi Fusion RP column in 82% methanol at a temperature of 25 °C. Under these conditions, the retention times of PEGs and PEGMMEs are sufficiently different to allow such a separation (not shown).
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Critical conditions for EO were found on the Synergi Fusion RP column in 82% methanol at a temperature of 25 °C.
conditions.notes: The text states the separation was achieved but notes the chromatogram is 'not shown'. The flow rate is taken from the general experimental section for System B (gradient system) where this column was used.
